---
title: ""
---

:::{.column-page}

<center>
![](assets/profile.jpg){width=200px style="border-radius: 50%;"}

# Fabian Kalleitner

**Postdoctoral Researcher**  
Chair of Sociology and Empirical Social Research (LS4)
Department of Sociology  
LMU Munich
</center>

## Hi!  {.no-border}

I am a Postdoctoral Researcher at the [Chair of Sociology and Empirical Social Research (LS4)](https://www.soziologie.lmu.de/en/our-department/faculty-and-staff/contact-page/fabian-kalleitner-e069e205.html), LMU Munich. My research interests include tax preferences, biased perceptions, fairness attitudes, and work values. To gather insights in these topics I combine theories and insights of sociology, economics, and psychology using various methodological approaches (i.e. panel surveys, multilevel analyses, survey/field/laboratory experiments) and estimation strategies.

You can contact me per email using [fabian.kalleitner@lmu.de](mailto:fabian.kalleitner@lmu.de).

[Curriculum Vitae](https://syncandshare.lrz.de/dl/fi8HMRufYxqLvPfidtaNit/CV_Fabian_Kalleitner_eng.pdf?inline&skipCounter=true)

<center>

<a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1196-824X" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID</a>
<a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Fabian-Kalleitner" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">{{< ai researchgate >}} ResearchGate</a>
<a href="https://scholar.google.at/citations?user=NoQflXIAAAAJ" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar</a>
<a href="https://bsky.app/profile/kalf.bsky.social" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-bluesky"></i> Bluesky</a>
</center>


---

:::{.columns}
:::{.column width="48%"}

### Education

<ul style="list-style: none; padding-left: 1.5em;">
<li style="text-indent: -1.5em; padding-left: 1.5em;"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> **PhD in Sociology** (2023)<br>University of Vienna</li>
<li style="text-indent: -1.5em; padding-left: 1.5em;"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> **MA in Sociology** (2017)<br>University of Vienna</li>
<li style="text-indent: -1.5em; padding-left: 1.5em;"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> **BA in History** (2015)<br>University of Vienna</li>
<li style="text-indent: -1.5em; padding-left: 1.5em;"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> **BA in Political Science** (2014)<br>University of Vienna</li>
</ul>

:::

:::{.column width="4%"}
:::

:::{.column width="48%"}

### Research Interests

- Economic & social inequality
- Quantitative methods
- Survey research methodology
- Tax and redistribution preferences
- Work values

:::
:::

:::
